title: kohautia effusa
intro: Kohautia effusa is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is commonly known as the "South African tea tree." The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kohautia effusa include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Kohautia effusa include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent, allowing for the extraction of its bioactive compounds.
